definition:
1. to come together by chance , (Iliad by Homer): to meet with  an accident, συγκύρσαι τύχῃ (Sophocles Tragicus); εἰς ἓν μοίρας ξυνέκυρσας art involved  in one and the same fate, (Euripides) 
2. with participle, like τυγχάνω, συνεκύρησε παραπεσοῦσα νηῦς fell in the way by chance , (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. of events and accidents, like συμβαίνω, to happen, occur , (Herdotus Historicus): —;impersonal, with infinitive, συνεκύρησε γενέσθαι it came to pass  that . ., (Herdotus Historicus):—;so, in Pass., τὸ ἐς Λακεδαιμονίους συγκεκυρημένον (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. of places, to be contiguous to , τινί (Polybius Historicus) (ML)
